message:
feat: expand command dispatch to 140+ commands with geo, streams, pub/sub, and blocking ops

Major expansion of the Redis command surface from ~100 to 140+ implemented
commands, bringing frankenredis significantly closer to full Redis 7.x
feature parity.

Command dispatch (fr-command/src/lib.rs):
- Geo commands: GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS,
  GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE with Haversine distance
  calculations and geohash encoding
- Stream commands: XADD, XLEN, XRANGE, XREVRANGE, XREAD, XINFO,
  XTRIM, XDEL, XACK, XCLAIM, XAUTOCLAIM, XGROUP, XREADGROUP,
  XPENDING with consumer group tracking
- Pub/Sub stubs: SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, PSUBSCRIBE, PUNSUBSCRIBE,
  PUBLISH, PUBSUB (structural stubs for protocol compliance)
- Blocking ops stubs: BLPOP, BRPOP, BLMOVE, BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH
  (timeout-aware structural stubs)
- Sorted set extensions: ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION,
  ZINTERCARD for complete sorted-set algebra
- List extensions: LMPOP for multi-key atomic list pops
- Set extensions: SINTERCARD for cardinality-only intersection
- String extensions: LCS (Longest Common Substring) via DP
- Bitmap: BITFIELD with GET/SET/INCRBY/OVERFLOW subcommands
- Server: MEMORY (USAGE/DOCTOR/STATS), SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/
  BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING, DEBUG, ROLE,
  SHUTDOWN, LATENCY (LATEST/HISTORY/RESET)
- Script stubs: EVAL, EVALSHA, SCRIPT (LOAD/EXISTS/FLUSH)
- Transaction: WATCH/UNWATCH for optimistic locking

Runtime (fr-runtime/src/lib.rs):
- Add infrastructure for stream entry storage and consumer groups
- Extend server state for geo indices and pub/sub channel tracking

Store (fr-store/src/lib.rs):
- Add geo sorted set storage with score-based geohash encoding
- Add stream data structures (entry ID generation, consumer groups)

Feature parity tracking (FEATURE_PARITY.md):
- Update command count from 100+ to 140+
- Document new command families and remaining gaps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,12 +15,12 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 
 | Feature Family | Status | Notes |
 |---|---|---|
-| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 100+ commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR), keys, hash, list (extended), set (SMISMEMBER), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands, cluster stubs |
+| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 140+ commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY), Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), EVAL/EVALSHA/SCRIPT stubs, cluster stubs; missing: Lua scripting engine, full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
 | Core data types and keyspace | in_progress | String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, HyperLogLog, and Geo data types implemented with full WRONGTYPE enforcement; Streams starter slice (`XADD`, `XLEN`, `XDEL`, `XTRIM`, `XREAD`, `XINFO STREAM/GROUPS/CONSUMERS`, `XGROUP CREATE`, `XGROUP DESTROY`, `XGROUP SETID`, `XGROUP CREATECONSUMER`, `XGROUP DELCONSUMER`, `XRANGE`, `XREVRANGE`) implemented, broader stream surface pending |
 | TTL and eviction behavior | in_progress | lazy expiry and `PTTL` semantics scaffolded (`-2/-1/remaining`) |
 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract scaffolded; full replay fidelity pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
-| ACL/config mode split | not_started | policy model exists; ACL behavior parity not yet implemented |
+| ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime; full parameter surface and ACL CAT/GENPASS/LOG pending |
 | Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites |
 | Benchmark + optimization artifacts | in_progress | round1 + round2 baseline JSON, syscall profile, and expanded golden checksum artifacts added |
 | Full command/API surface closure | not_started | program-level closure row; all deferred families must roll up here before release sign-off |
